steps.title: register and arrive naturally in the workspace
sign out and sign back in without a cookie bridge
preview and dispatch one deterministic mock video
reconcile every provider job to a terminal success
simulate the external stitch runner claim and authenticated completion
open, play, and download the completed customer asset
